manuscript_claim: Li4SiO4 pebble degradation is a nuclear-materials issue because crushing can affect bed stiffness load transfer thermal-contact networks and helium purge pathways
wording_boundary: Do not claim ITER or CFETR design-margin prediction from the present pilot calculations.

manuscript_claim: A 1 mm mother pebble can be represented by a 500-subparticle bonded template for event-sequence screening
wording_boundary: Call it a current calibration candidate or load-scale and fragment-mode matched template. Do not call it a final Li4SiO4 material law.

manuscript_claim: First-break displacement and split-type morphology are robust across the tested resolution and loading-rate windows
wording_boundary: State that peak load retains moderate resolution and rate sensitivity. Do not imply full numerical convergence.

manuscript_claim: Corrected bed fracture interpretation requires zero seating damage native force connectivity and force-balance gates
wording_boundary: Keep superseded diagnostic bed-scale claims withdrawn unless labelled as audit-only. Do not reuse superseded bed-scale fracture claims as active evidence.

manuscript_claim: The corrected pilot shows localized upper-bed microcracking rather than bed-wide fragmentation within 60 micrometres
wording_boundary: Do not generalize to failure probability or universal onset displacement.

manuscript_claim: The independent corrected bed and 0.5x/0.25x strength-window audits remain intact despite spanning native force graphs
wording_boundary: Interpret as local force-path sensitivity. Do not infer universal toughness or deterministic strength threshold.

manuscript_claim: Macroscopic response and force-network topology provide a mesoscale bridge between granular load paths and breeder-pebble microcrack activation
wording_boundary: Tie topology to ceramic damage initiation and transport-relevant contact networks. Do not treat topology or secant response as a standalone materials property or coupled thermal-flow prediction.

manuscript_claim: The paper provides auditable event-sequence evidence rather than a completed predictive design study
wording_boundary: Do not claim converged failure probability lifetime prediction or blanket design margin.

manuscript_claim: The reduced reproducibility package supports manuscript-level auditing of processed data figures tables and scripts
wording_boundary: Do not submit as fully complete until the repository DOI or stable URL is inserted.
